name: Checks Cashed
description_short: Checks.com is an online personal check printer offering affordable custom check designs with fraud protection and fast shipping since 2006.
description_long:
Checks.com was founded in Colorado Springs, Colorado in 2006 with the mission to provide high-quality personal checks at affordable prices. The company operates exclusively through online ordering to keep costs low and has maintained this model for over 20 years. They position themselves as a direct-to-consumer check printing service focused on value and convenience.

The company offers personal checks starting at $8.20 per box across three main product tiers: Value Checks ($8.20), Traditional Checks ($9.20), and Choice Checks ($10.20 with exclusive Disney designs). Customers can choose from over 70 check designs including classic styles, Disney-branded options, animal themes, and scenic patterns. Beyond checks, they sell coordinating products like checkbook covers, address labels, and deposit slips. All orders include SentryShield Pro fraud protection and come with a 100% satisfaction guarantee. The website emphasizes secure SSL ordering and order verification with financial institutions.

Checks.com distinguishes itself through competitive pricing with no discount codes required, a wide range of design options including licensed Disney properties, extensive customization capabilities (fonts, monograms, custom messages), and fast shipping options for urgent needs. They highlight their online-only model as enabling their low prices and their 100% satisfaction guarantee as a confidence builder for online purchases.

As a check printer, Checks.com serves a practical but declining market segment. While they offer legitimate value through low prices and design variety, checks themselves are becoming less central to consumer finance. The company's model depends on continued demand for physical checks and successful online ordering. Their positioning is solid for customers who still regularly use checks and want affordable, personalized options, but the broader trend toward digital payments limits growth potential in this category.
pros: Starting prices as low as $8.20 per box with no discount codes or promotional requirements needed
Over 70 check design options including licensed Disney designs, animal themes, scenic, and classic styles
Extensive customization options including fonts, monograms, and custom messages via online configurator
SentryShield Pro fraud protection included on all orders
Fast shipping upgrade options available for time-sensitive orders
Coordinating products available (checkbook covers, address labels, deposit slips) for complete check ordering solutions
cons: Check usage is declining as digital payments and ACH transfers become standard, limiting long-term relevance
Online-only ordering model provides no phone or in-person support options for customers who need assistance
No information provided about shipping costs, delivery timeframes, or actual pricing on rush shipping upgrades
best_for: Customers who still regularly write checks and want affordable personalized check options
Small business owners and sole proprietors needing business check printing at consumer prices
People seeking checks with specific design themes (Disney, animals, classic styles) for personal checking accounts
diagnosis: Checks.com is best for individuals and small business owners who actively use paper checks and want affordable, design-forward options without shopping in physical stores. The main caveat is that check usage has declined significantly in modern consumer finance, so this service appeals to a shrinking market segment despite competitive pricing and good customization options.
services: Personal check printing in multiple design categories (Traditional, Value, Choice)
High-security check options with fraud protection
Custom check personalization (monograms, fonts, custom messages)
